items.name_cn:

removable
shoulder strap for switching between handbag and shoulder bag styles
Back decorated with Equestrian Knight Emblem (EKD) embossing
Dimensions 30 x 13x 24cm.

items.name_en: ❤️B Brand Latest Zippered Crossbody Bag, made from protective cotton blend fabric. Decorated with fine B Brand exclusive check fabric, echoing the B-shaped accessory design, presenting a square silhouette, incorporating geometric topstitching details. Lined with lambskin, featuring an adjustable calfskin shoulder strap for switching between crossbody and shoulder styles. Dimensions 20x 6.5x 15.5cm.
items.name_cn: ❤️B Brand Latest Zippered Crossbody Bag, made from protective cotton blend fabric. Decorated with fine B Brand exclusive check fabric, echoing the B-shaped accessory design, presenting a square silhouette, incorporating geometric topstitching details. items.name_en: ❤️B Brand LolaTB Plush Wool Blend Chain Bag, crafted from Italian fine-gauge cotton and plush wool blend tweed for durability and a rich atmosphere. Inspired by the brand's signature plaid, featuring a Thomas logo and minimalist design. Beautiful adjustable gold chain strap, perfect for shoulder or crossbody wear. Magnetic flap closure, lightweight, and holds up to daily wear. Stylish and versatile.

items.name_en: ❤️B Brand Pure Original Pocket Bag, Cowhide with Canvas, Caramel Coffee + Cream White colorway, retro and high-end yet durable. It has a bit of a cute academic vibe and a strong British tone. Can be sweet or salty, looks great handheld or crossbody! Handheld gives a better street snap vibe, the more you look, the more you like it. Large: 37×9.5×41cm
